mapper.sql: select e.equipment_id, e.equipment_code, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_type, e.building_id, b.building_name, e.company_id, fc.company_name, e.floor_no, e.system_name, e.project_category, e.location, e.manufacturer, e.model, e.quantity, e.image, e.production_date, e.install_date, e.expire_date, e.last_check_date, e.next_check_date, e.equipment_status, e.status, e.del_flag, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark from fire_equipment e left join fire_building b on e.building_id = b.building_id left join fire_company fc on e.company_id = fc.company_id
mapper.select: where e.del_flag = '0' and e.status = '0' order by e.equipment_name
select equipment_id, equipment_code, equipment_name from fire_equipment where equipment_code = #{equipmentCode} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0'
select equipment_type as name, count(*) as value from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' group by equipment_type
select equipment_status as name, count(*) as value from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' group by equipment_status
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and equipment_status = 'normal'
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and equipment_status = 'warning'
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and equipment_status = 'fault'
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and equipment_status = 'expired'
mapper.insert: insert into fire_equipment( equipment_id, equipment_code, equipment_name, equipment_type, building_id, company_id, floor_no, system_name, project_category, location, manufacturer, model, quantity, image, production_date, install_date, expire_date, last_check_date, next_check_date, equipment_status, status, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentCode}, #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentType}, #{buildingId}, #{companyId}, #{floorNo}, #{systemName}, #{projectCategory}, #{location}, #{manufacturer}, #{model}, #{quantity}, #{image}, #{productionDate}, #{installDate}, #{expireDate}, #{lastCheckDate}, #{nextCheckDate}, #{equipmentStatus}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update fire_equipment set del_flag = '2' where equipment_id in
#{equipmentId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and expire_date is not null and expire_date >= CURDATE() and expire_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and expire_date is not null and expire_date < CURDATE()
select count(*) from fire_equipment where del_flag = '0' and (expire_date is null or expire_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))
where e.del_flag = '0' and e.expire_date is not null and e.expire_date >= CURDATE() and e.expire_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) order by e.expire_date asc limit 5
where e.del_flag = '0' and e.expire_date is not null and e.expire_date < CURDATE() order by e.expire_date desc limit 5
where e.del_flag = '0' order by e.create_time desc limit 5
